---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggtree)
library(here)
library(ggpubr)
library(treeio)
library(here)
```

#setup
```{r}
tree.file <- here("../figures/revisions/spades_fhet_imiss.treesummary")
#spades.tree <- treeio::read.nexus(tree.file)

spades.tree <- treeio::read.beast(tree.file)

tips <- spades.tree@phylo$tip.label
tips.indv <- str_split(tips, "_", simplify = T)[,2]
tips.seq.run <- str_split(tips, "_", simplify = T)[,1]

birth.years <- read.csv(here("../figures/revisions/birthyears.csv"))
tree.metadata <- data.frame("sample.full" = tips, "sample" = as.integer(tips.indv), "seq_run" = tips.seq.run)
#add tip labels with birth year
year.metadata <- left_join(tree.metadata, birth.years, by = "sample") %>% mutate(year.born=as.integer(year.born))
```

#wrangling

```{r}
#apparent obs
apparent_rels <- read.csv(here("../figures/revisions/apparent.csv"))

aPOs <- apparent_rels %>% filter(relation=="PO")
aHSs <- apparent_rels %>% filter(relation=="HS+") 
aFSs <- apparent_rels %>% filter(relation=="FS")
aBPs <- apparent_rels %>% filter(relation=="BP")

#behavioural obs
behaviour_rels <- read.csv(here("../figures/revisions/behaviour.csv")) 

bPOs <- behaviour_rels %>% filter(relation=="PO")
bHSs <- behaviour_rels %>% filter(relation=="HS+")
bBPs <- behaviour_rels %>% filter(relation=="BP")
bFSs <- behaviour_rels %>% filter(relation=="FS")
```

#Plots

## Fig 1 - roundrect trees tree with consensus
```{r}
(ggtree(spades.tree, layout = "roundrect") %>% ggtree::rotate(86) %>% 
    ggtree::rotate(142) %>% ggtree::rotate(95) %>%  ggtree::rotate(119) %>%
    ggtree::rotate(141)+
  geom_text(aes(label=label, hjust = -0.2)) +
    geom_text(aes(label=node))
 )  %<+% year.metadata +
    geom_tiplab(aes(label = sample), size=4, offset = 0.001, hjust = 0.5)

f1_tree <- (ggtree(spades.tree, layout = "roundrect") %>% ggtree::rotate(86) %>% 
    ggtree::rotate(142) %>% ggtree::rotate(95) %>%  ggtree::rotate(119) %>%
    ggtree::rotate(141) %>% ggtree::rotate(113) %>% ggtree::rotate(92))  %<+% year.metadata +
    geom_tiplab(aes(label = paste0(sample, sex)), size=4, offset = 0.0001, hjust = 0)

off1 <- 0.00125
off2 <- 0.00035
consensus_highlight_tree <- (ggtree(spades.tree, layout = "roundrect", xlim = c(NA,6)) %>% ggtree::rotate(86) %>% 
    ggtree::rotate(142) %>% ggtree::rotate(95) %>%  ggtree::rotate(119) %>%
    ggtree::rotate(141) %>% ggtree::rotate(113) %>% ggtree::rotate(92))  %<+% year.metadata +
    geom_tiplab(aes(label = paste0(sample, sex)), size=4, offset = 0.0001, hjust = 0) + 
  geom_strip("manu_62", "manu_59", label = "FS(59_62)", color = "#44AA99", offset = off1, barsize = 2, offset.text = off2)  +
  geom_strip("STILT_82", "manu_81", label = "FS(81_82)", color = "#44AA99", offset = off1, barsize = 2, offset.text = off2)  +
  geom_strip("manu_17", "manu_65", label = "PO(17_65)", color = "#D55E00", offset = off1, barsize = 2, offset.text = off2)  +
  geom_strip("manu_16", "manu_69", label = "HS+(16_69)", color = "#44AA99", offset = off1, barsize = 2, offset.text = off2)  +
  geom_strip("manu_69", "manu_67", label = "FS(67_69)", color = "#44AA99", offset = off1, barsize = 2, offset.text = off2)  +
  geom_strip("STILT_86", "manu_87", label = "FS(86_87)", color = "#44AA99", offset = off1, barsize = 2, offset.text = off2)  +
  geom_highlight(node=62, fill = "#44AA99") +
  geom_highlight(node=58, fill = "#44AA99") +
  geom_highlight(node=76, fill = "#44AA99") +
  geom_highlight(node=31, fill = "#44AA99") +
  geom_highlight(node=47, fill = "#44AA99") +
  geom_highlight(node=48, fill = "#D55E00") +
  geom_highlight(node=64, fill = "#D55E00") +
  geom_highlight(node=68, fill = "#44AA99") +
  geom_highlight(node=66, fill = "#44AA99") +
  geom_highlight(node=32, fill = "#44AA99") +
  geom_highlight(node=80, fill = "#44AA99") 
```


##base circular tree plot

```{r}
inward.circle <- ggtree(spades.tree) %>% 
   ggtree::rotate(86) %>% 
    ggtree::rotate(142) %>% ggtree::rotate(95) %>%  ggtree::rotate(119) %>%
    ggtree::rotate(141) %>% ggtree::rotate(113) %>% ggtree::rotate(92) +
    layout_inward_circular(xlim=.3) 

    

inward.circle
```

##apparent

```{r}
offset.var <- 0.29
curvature.var <- 10
hratio <- 2

po.col <- "#D55E00"
hs.col <- "#44AA99"
fs.col <- "#44AA99"
bp.col <- ""

po.lt <- 1
fs.lt <- 1
hs.lt <- 6

apparent.plot <- inward.circle  %<+% year.metadata +
  geom_tippoint(aes(x=x+0.005, color = factor(year.born), size = 3)) +#, shape = factor(year.born), alpha = 0.2)) +
    geom_tiplab(aes(label = paste0(sex, sample)), size=4, offset = -.027, hjust = 0.1) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c(rep(18, nrow(year.metadata)))) +
  
#triads
  geom_taxalink(aPOs[1,1], aPOs[1,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aPOs[2,1], aPOs[2,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aPOs[3,1], aPOs[3,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aPOs[4,1], aPOs[4,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aPOs[5,1], aPOs[5,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aPOs[6,1], aPOs[6,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aPOs[7,1], aPOs[7,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aPOs[8,1], aPOs[8,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  
#dryads FS  
  geom_taxalink(aFSs [1,1], aFSs [1,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aFSs [2,1], aFSs [2,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aFSs [3,1], aFSs [3,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aFSs [4,1], aFSs [4,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aFSs [5,1], aFSs [5,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aFSs [6,1], aFSs [6,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aFSs [7,1], aFSs [7,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  
#dryads HS+
  geom_taxalink(aHSs [1,1], aHSs [1,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aHSs [2,1], aHSs [2,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aHSs [3,1], aHSs [3,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aHSs [4,1], aHSs [4,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aHSs [5,1], aHSs [5,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aHSs [6,1], aHSs [6,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aHSs [7,1], aHSs [7,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aHSs [8,1], aHSs [8,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  
#BreedingPair BP
  #geom_taxalink(aBPs [1,1], aBPs [1,2], color = bp.col, linetype = bp.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) 
    
  geom_line(aes(x=0, y=0, alpha = "PO")) +
  geom_line(aes(x=0, y=0, alpha = "FS")) +
  geom_line(aes(x=0, y=0, alpha = "HS")) +
  scale_alpha_discrete(labels = c("Parent-Offspring",  "Full Sibilings", "Half Sibiling+")) +
  
  guides(size=F, 
         color = guide_legend(title = "Year Born", 
                                      override.aes = list(size = 7),
                                      position = "left"),
         alpha = guide_legend(title = "Relationship",
                              position = "right",
                              override.aes = list(color = c(po.col, fs.col, hs.col),
                                                  alpha = c(1,1,1),
                                                  linetype = c(1,1,6),
                                                  linewidth = c(1,1,1)))) +
  
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(-1,0,-3,0),"cm"),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, vjust = -18, size = 20, face = "bold"),
        plot.background = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.title=element_text(size=18), 
        legend.text=element_text(size=16)) +
  ggtitle("{apparent} Relationships")
```

##behavior

```{r}

offset.var <- 0.29
curvature.var <- 10
hratio <- 2

po.col <- "#D55E00"
hs.col <- "#44AA99"
fs.col <- "#44AA99"

po.lt <- 1
fs.lt <- 1
hs.lt <- 6

behav.plot <- inward.circle  %<+% year.metadata +
  geom_tippoint(aes(x=x+0.005, color = factor(year.born), size = 3)) +#, shape = factor(year.born), alpha = 0.2)) +
    geom_tiplab(aes(label = paste0(sex, sample)), size=4, offset = -.027, hjust = 0.1) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c(rep(18, nrow(year.metadata)))) +
  
#PO
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[1,1], bPOs[1,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[2,1], bPOs[2,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[3,1], bPOs[3,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[4,1], bPOs[4,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[5,1], bPOs[5,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[6,1], bPOs[6,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[7,1], bPOs[7,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[8,1], bPOs[8,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[9,1], bPOs[9,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[10,1], bPOs[10,2], color = po.col, linetype = po.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +

#dryads FS  
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [1,1], bFSs [1,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [2,1], bFSs [2,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [3,1], bFSs [3,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [4,1], bFSs [4,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [5,1], bFSs [5,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [6,1], bFSs [6,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [7,1], bFSs [7,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [8,1], bFSs [8,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [9,1], bFSs [9,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [10,1], bFSs [10,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [11,1], bFSs [11,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [12,1], bFSs [12,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [13,1], bFSs [13,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [14,1], bFSs [14,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [15,1], bFSs [15,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [16,1], bFSs [16,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [17,1], bFSs [17,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [18,1], bFSs [18,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [19,1], bFSs [19,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [20,1], bFSs [20,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [21,1], bFSs [21,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [22,1], bFSs [22,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [23,1], bFSs [23,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [24,1], bFSs [24,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [25,1], bFSs [25,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [26,1], bFSs [26,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [27,1], bFSs [27,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [28,1], bFSs [28,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [29,1], bFSs [29,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [30,1], bFSs [30,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [31,1], bFSs [31,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [32,1], bFSs [32,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [33,1], bFSs [33,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [34,1], bFSs [34,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [35,1], bFSs [35,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [36,1], bFSs [36,2], color = fs.col, linetype = fs.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +

#dryads HS+
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [1,1], bHSs [1,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [2,1], bHSs [2,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [3,1], bHSs [3,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [4,1], bHSs [4,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [5,1], bHSs [5,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [6,1], bHSs [6,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [7,1], bHSs [7,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [8,1], bHSs [8,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [9,1], bHSs [9,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [10,1], bHSs [10,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [11,1], bHSs [11,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [12,1], bHSs [12,2], color = hs.col, linetype = hs.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +

  geom_line(aes(x=0, y=0, alpha = "PO")) +
  geom_line(aes(x=0, y=0, alpha = "FS")) +
  geom_line(aes(x=0, y=0, alpha = "HS")) +
  scale_alpha_discrete(labels = c("Parent-Offspring",  "Full Sibilings", "Half Sibiling+")) +
  
  guides(size=F, 
         color = guide_legend(title = "Year Born", 
                                      override.aes = list(size = 7),
                                      position = "left"),
         alpha = guide_legend(title = "Relationship",
                              position = "right",
                              override.aes = list(color = c(po.col, fs.col, hs.col),
                                                  alpha = c(1,1,1),
                                                  linetype = c(1,1,6),
                                                  linewidth = c(1,1,1)))) +
  
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(-1,0,-3,0),"cm"),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, vjust = -18, size = 20, face = "bold"),
        plot.background = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.title=element_text(size=18), 
        legend.text=element_text(size=16)) +
  ggtitle("Behavioral Relationships")

```

##consensus

```{r}
offset.var <- 0.29
curvature.var <- 10
  
  po.col1 <- "#ABABAB"
  fs.col1 <- "#ABABAB"
  hs.col1 <- "#ABABAB"

  po.lt <- 1
  hs.lt <- 6
  app.lt <- 1
  
  beh.lt <- 6
  app.lt <- 1
  
  po.col2 <- "#D55E00"
  po.lt2 <- 1
  hs.col2 <- "#44AA99"
  hs.lt2 <- 6
  fs.col2 <- "#44AA99"
  fs.lt2 <- 1
  
  noncon.col <- "#ABABAB"

consensus.plot <- inward.circle  %<+% year.metadata +
  geom_tippoint(aes(x=x+0.005, color = factor(year.born), size = 3)) +#, shape = factor(year.born), alpha = 0.2)) +
    geom_tiplab(aes(label = paste0(sex, sample)), size=4, offset = -.027, hjust = 0.1) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c(rep(18, nrow(year.metadata))))  +

  geom_taxalink(bPOs[1,1], bPOs[1,2], color = po.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[2,1], bPOs[2,2], color = po.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[3,1], bPOs[3,2], color = po.col2, alpha = 1, linetype = beh.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[4,1], bPOs[4,2], color = po.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[5,1], bPOs[5,2], color = po.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, , curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[6,1], bPOs[6,2], color = po.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[7,1], bPOs[7,2], color = po.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[8,1], bPOs[8,2], color = po.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[9,1], bPOs[9,2], color = po.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bPOs[10,1], bPOs[10,2], color = po.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +

  #apparentPOs
  geom_taxalink(aPOs[1,1], aPOs[1,2], color = po.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = app.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aPOs[2,1], aPOs[2,2], color = po.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = app.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +   
  geom_taxalink(aPOs[3,1], aPOs[3,2], color = po.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = app.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) + 
  geom_taxalink(aPOs[4,1], aPOs[4,2], color = po.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = app.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) + 
  geom_taxalink(aPOs[5,1], aPOs[5,2], color = po.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = app.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) + 
  geom_taxalink(aPOs[6,1], aPOs[6,2], color = po.col2, alpha = 1, linetype = app.lt, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) + 
  geom_taxalink(aPOs[7,1], aPOs[7,2], color = po.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = app.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) + 
  geom_taxalink(aPOs[8,1], aPOs[8,2], color = po.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = app.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) + 
  
#dryads HS+

  geom_taxalink(bHSs [1,1], bHSs [1,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [2,1], bHSs [2,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [3,1], bHSs [3,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [4,1], bHSs [4,2], color = hs.col2, alpha = 1, linetype = hs.lt, linewidth = 1, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [5,1], bHSs [5,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [6,1], bHSs [6,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [7,1], bHSs [7,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [8,1], bHSs [8,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [9,1], bHSs [9,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [10,1], bHSs [10,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [11,1], bHSs [11,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bHSs [12,1], bHSs [12,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +

  #apparentHS
  geom_taxalink(aHSs [1,1], aHSs [1,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = app.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aHSs [2,1], aHSs [2,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = app.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) + 
  geom_taxalink(aHSs [3,1], aHSs [3,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = app.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) + 
  geom_taxalink(aHSs [4,1], aHSs [4,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = app.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) + 
  geom_taxalink(aHSs [5,1], aHSs [5,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = app.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) + 
  geom_taxalink(aHSs [6,1], aHSs [6,2], color = hs.col2, alpha = 1, linetype = hs.lt, linewidth = 1, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) + 
  geom_taxalink(aHSs [7,1], aHSs [7,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = app.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) + 
  geom_taxalink(aHSs [8,1], aHSs [8,2], color = hs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = app.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) + 


#dryads FS

  geom_taxalink(bFSs [1,1], bFSs [1,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [2,1], bFSs [2,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [3,1], bFSs [3,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [4,1], bFSs [4,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [5,1], bFSs [5,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [6,1], bFSs [6,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [7,1], bFSs [7,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [8,1], bFSs [8,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [9,1], bFSs [9,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [10,1], bFSs [10,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [11,1], bFSs [11,2], color = fs.col2, alpha = 1, linetype = fs.lt2, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [12,1], bFSs [12,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [13,1], bFSs [13,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [14,1], bFSs [14,2], color = fs.col2, alpha = 1, linetype = fs.lt2, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [15,1], bFSs [15,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [16,1], bFSs [16,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [17,1], bFSs [17,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [18,1], bFSs [18,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [19,1], bFSs [19,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [20,1], bFSs [20,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [21,1], bFSs [21,2], color = fs.col2, alpha = 1, linetype = fs.lt2, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [22,1], bFSs [22,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [23,1], bFSs [23,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [24,1], bFSs [24,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [25,1], bFSs [25,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [26,1], bFSs [26,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [27,1], bFSs [27,2], color = fs.col2, alpha = 1, linetype = fs.lt2, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [28,1], bFSs [28,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = fs.lt2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [29,1], bFSs [29,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [30,1], bFSs [30,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [31,1], bFSs [31,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [32,1], bFSs [32,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [33,1], bFSs [33,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [34,1], bFSs [34,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [35,1], bFSs [35,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(bFSs [36,1], bFSs [36,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = beh.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +

  
  #apparentFSs
  geom_taxalink(aFSs [1,1], aFSs [1,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = app.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aFSs [2,1], aFSs [2,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = app.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aFSs [3,1], aFSs [3,2], color = fs.col2, alpha = 1, linetype = fs.lt2, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aFSs [4,1], aFSs [4,2], color = fs.col2, alpha = 1, linetype = fs.lt2, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aFSs [5,1], aFSs [5,2], color = fs.col1, alpha = 0.5, linetype = app.lt, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aFSs [6,1], aFSs [6,2], color = fs.col2, alpha = 1, linetype = fs.lt2, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +
  geom_taxalink(aFSs [7,1], aFSs [7,2], color = fs.col2, alpha = 1, linetype = fs.lt2, linewidth = 2, curvature = curvature.var, offset = offset.var, hratio = hratio) +

  geom_line(aes(x=0, y=0, alpha = "PO")) +
  geom_line(aes(x=0, y=0, alpha = "FS")) +
  geom_line(aes(x=0, y=0, alpha = "HS")) +
  geom_line(aes(x=0, y=0, alpha = "beh")) +
  geom_line(aes(x=0, y=0, alpha = "app")) +
  scale_alpha_discrete(labels = c("Parent-Offspring",  "Full Sibilings", "Half Sibiling+", "Behavioural Only", "{apparent} only")) +
  
  guides(size=F, 
         color = guide_legend(title = "Year Born", 
                                      override.aes = list(size = 5),
                                      position = "left"),
         alpha = guide_legend(title = "Relationship",
                              position = "right",
                              override.aes = list(color = c(po.col2, fs.col2, hs.col2, noncon.col, noncon.col),
                                                  alpha = c(1,1,1,1,1),
                                                  linetype = c(1,1,6,6,1),
                                                  linewidth = c(1,1,1,1,1)))) +
  
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(-1,0,-3,0),"cm"),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, vjust = -18, size = 20, face = "bold"),
        plot.background = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.title=element_text(size=18), 
        legend.text=element_text(size=16)) +
  ggtitle("Consensus Relationships")
```


#individual/quick

```{r}
f1_highlight_tree
apparent.plot
behav.plot
consensus.plot
```

#ggsave

```{r}
ggplot2::ggsave(filename = here("../figures/revisions/consensus_tree_revised_may2026.png"), plot = consensus_highlight_tree, dpi = 600, width = 20, height = 12, units = "in")
ggplot2::ggsave(filename = here("../figures/revisions/f1_tree_revised_may2026.png"), plot = f1_tree, dpi = 600, width = 16, height = 12, units = "in")
ggplot2::ggsave(filename = here("../figures/revisions/apparent_revised_may2026.png"), plot = apparent.plot, dpi = 600, width = 16, height = 12, units = "in")
ggplot2::ggsave(filename = here("../figures/revisions/behaviour_revised_may2026.png"), plot = behav.plot, dpi = 600, width = 16, height = 12, units = "in")
ggplot2::ggsave(filename = here("../figures/revisions/consensus_revised_may2026.png"), plot = consensus.plot, dpi = 600, width = 16, height = 12, units = "in")
#ggplot2::ggsave(filename = here("../figures/revisions/legend_smallsept2025.png"), plot = line_legend, dpi = 600, width = 4, height = 3, units = "in")
```
